disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden crop of hundreds of small tense clear-fluid blisters on both soles over 48 hours, intensely itchy and burning
trigger_question_examples: What do the blisters look like and where are they?
How quickly did they come up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Both my soles are covered in hundreds of tiny, deep, clear blisters that came up over the last two days, and they itch and burn like crazy.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Concurrent macerated, peeling, fissured skin in the lateral toe web spaces with chronic scaling along the borders of the feet
trigger_question_examples: What is the skin like between your toes?
Have you had any peeling or cracking skin on your feet before?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The skin between my outer toes is soggy, white and cracked, and I've had flaky, peeling skin on my feet on and off for ages.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Onset followed several days of occlusive footwear (heavy boots, thick wool socks) and excessive sweating in hot conditions
trigger_question_examples: What kind of shoes and socks have you been wearing?
Have your feet been hot or sweaty lately?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'd been in closed heavy boots and thick wool socks for days in the heat and my feet were sweating a lot.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever, systemically well, and no spreading redness or red streaks up the foot or leg
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any fever or feel unwell in yourself?
Is there any redness spreading up your foot or leg, or red streaks?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fever, I feel fine in myself otherwise, and there's no redness creeping up my foot or leg.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The blister fluid is clear and there is no thick yellow pus or honey-coloured crusting
trigger_question_examples: Is the fluid in the blisters clear, or is it thick and yellow like pus?
Is there any yellow crusting on the skin?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The fluid looks clear to me — there's no thick yellow pus and no yellow crusting.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Mild distal nail thickening and yellow discolouration; malodour from the feet
trigger_question_examples: Is there any smell from your feet?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My toenails are a bit thick and yellow at the ends, and there's a bit of a smell.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe burning pain on weight-bearing causing functional immobility (crawling / using furniture)
trigger_question_examples: How is this affecting your walking?
Can you put weight on your feet?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The burning is so bad I can't stand on my feet at all — I've been crawling or holding onto the furniture to get around.
